infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FOS requires camera access to take duty punch-in selfies.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs access to your location at all times to track field officer duty sessions.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to track field officer duty sessions.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location at all times to track field officer duty sessions.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow FOS to access your location at all times for duty tracking.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FOS to access your photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FOS to access your camera for duty selfies.
